fields.description:
-- 월별 사용 고객사 수 (회의방 생성 기준, 테스트회사 제외)
SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', r.created_at), 'YYYY.MM') AS year_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.cno) AS unique_company_count
FROM 
    video.t_room r
WHERE 
    r.is_deleted = false
    AND (r.call_type IS NULL OR r.call_type != 2)
    AND r.cno IS NOT NULL
    AND r.cno NOT IN (9, 599482, 1015908, 1051726, 1045263, 1054514)
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', r.created_at)
ORDER BY 
    year_month DESC;


-- 2026년 1월 회의방을 생성한 고객사 cno 목록
SELECT 
    r.cno,
    COUNT(*) AS room_count
FROM 
    video.t_room r
WHERE 
    r.created_at >= '2026-01-01'
    AND r.created_at < '2026-02-01'
    AND r.is_deleted = false
    AND (r.call_type IS NULL OR r.call_type != 2)
    AND r.cno IS NOT NULL
    AND r.cno NOT IN (9, 599482, 1015908, 1051726, 1045263, 1054514)
GROUP BY 
    r.cno
ORDER BY 
    room_count DESC;



-- 월별 사용 고객사 수 (접속 사용자 기준, 테스트회사 제외)
SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', h.access_date_time), 'YYYY.MM') AS year_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.cno) AS unique_company_count
FROM 
    video.t_room_connected_user_history h
    INNER JOIN video.t_room r ON h.t_room_id = r.room_id
WHERE 
    h.access_date_time IS NOT NULL
    AND r.is_deleted = false
    AND (r.call_type IS NULL OR r.call_type != 2)
    AND r.cno IS NOT NULL
    AND r.cno NOT IN (9, 599482, 1015908, 1051726, 1045263, 1054514)
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', h.access_date_time)
ORDER BY 
    year_month DESC;
